claim_boundary.containment_rule: The model may not create positive authority; exact selector rejects and holds dominate model output.
claim_boundary.non_circularity_rule: No packet asks whether PostFiat should adopt its own architecture.
claim_boundary.positive_claim: AI governance classification is tested as a replayable, typed, downgrade-capable live-effect input.
